title: Bean Coin Mod
description: This mod adds bean coins to the game.
body:
# Bean Coin Mod

This mod adds bean coins to the game. It can be used on servers as a currency. The recipe for 1 copper bean coin is 4 copper ingots. Things like silver, golden or netherite coins are made by crafting 8 coins from a lower tier together.

update 1.1.0:
1 copper ingot now crafts into 4 copper bean coins.
